title: Generate SAS program to create SDTM CM (Concomitant Medications) domain

inputs.prompt: Write a SAS program to create the SDTM CM (Concomitant Medications) domain dataset. The program must: (1) Read raw concomitant medications data, (2) Derive USUBJID and CMSEQ (sequential numbering per subject), (3) Map key variables: CMTRT, CMDECOD, CMINDC, CMCLAS, CMROUTE, CMSTDTC, CMENDTC, CMDOSU, CMDOSFRQ, (4) Handle ATC classification mapping, medication coding from verbatim, indication mapping, route of administration, dose frequency standardization, (5) Apply variable attributes per SDTM specification, (6) Create a permanent SAS dataset with xport format. The dataset contains approximately 2982 records.
